description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. These black leather sandals from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans, to shorts and skirts. The leather panel strips in different colours gives it a unique look. UpperLeather bands on the forefoot in different coloursLeather heel cupElastic band looped through the forefoot straps and attached to the heel cup for a snug FitSoft leather lining for added comfortCushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and heel for better gripshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
